statement.en: An equality-based weighted residual formulation for three-dimensional contact in aeroengine blades

proposer: Sophia McDonald, Rhys Aron, C. Legrand et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper dated 2026-04-25 is a future date (temporally impossible from 2024-2025 reference frame). Abstract provided is incomplete/truncated, preventing substantive evaluation of the mathematical claim. The title suggests a legitimate engineering mechanics contribution (weighted residual methods, contact mechanics, turbomachinery), but without abstract content, the axiom remains unvalidated and provisional.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 接触する羽根の呼吸は、重み付けられた残差の完全な消失において平衡を保つ。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 三次元の羽根は中心の平衡点を介して対称な接触力を受け入れ、境界で共鳴する。
